old_value: {"id":"smallhold-ao5","title":"POST /api/v1/apps — OAuth2 app registration","description":"Implement Mastodon app registration endpoint. Clients POST their name, redirect_uri, scopes, and website. Returns client_id (UUID), client_secret (random), and vapid_key (empty string — clients handle absence). Store in oauth_apps table.","design":"client_id: UUID v4. client_secret: 32 random bytes, base64url. vapid_key: empty string (not supported). Scopes stored as space-separated string. Return 200 with JSON matching Mastodon's Application object shape.","acceptance_criteria":"Ivory and Phanpy can register themselves against the instance; response includes client_id, client_secret, redirect_uri, scopes, name; duplicate registrations create new rows (clients may re-register)","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T00:03:35Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T00:03:35Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-z8j","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:03:37Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
